# Hisaab

> A zero-friction trading journal for Indian traders.

Hisaab is a free, open-source, browser-based trading journal. Upload your broker CSV and see your real win rate in 2 minutes. No signup. No server. No data leaves your browser.

## Key Facts

- URL: https://hisaab.trymetis.app
- Category: Finance / Trading Tools
- Price: Free (MIT licensed, open source)
- Privacy: 100% client-side, zero network requests, data stays in browser (IndexedDB)
- Supported Brokers: Zerodha, Groww, Upstox, Angel One
- Tech: Next.js static export, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Dexie.js (IndexedDB)

## What Hisaab Does

- Parses broker tradebook CSVs and XLSX files (Zerodha, Groww, Upstox, Angel One)
- FIFO trade matching with partial fill support
- Calculates net P&L, win rate, profit factor, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown
- Monte Carlo simulation and Kelly criterion position sizing
- Calendar heatmap showing daily P&L across the Indian financial year (Apr-Mar)
- Trade journal with notes, strategy tags, emotion tracking, and ratings
- Tax report generation with STCG/LTCG classification and ITR-ready CSV export
- PWA with offline support

## Who It's For

Indian retail traders and investors who trade on NSE/BSE through Zerodha, Groww, Upstox, or Angel One and want instant analytics without sharing their financial data with any server.

## Links

- Live App: https://hisaab.trymetis.app
- Demo: https://hisaab.trymetis.app/demo
- Source Code: https://github.com/Devansh-365/hisaab
- Full LLM Context: https://hisaab.trymetis.app/llms-full.txt
